'''''Wurrif''-class light cruisers''' were the mid-range ships of the [[Ssi-ruu]]k.

==Characteristics==
The ''Wurrif''-class was designed to escort the large, vital ships of the Ssi-ruuvi fleet, such as [[Shree-class battle cruiser|''Shree''-class battle cruisers]], [[Sh'ner-class planetary assault carrier|''Sh'ner''-class planetary assault carriers]], and [[Lwhekk-class manufacturing ship|''Lwhekk''-class manufacturing ships]]. They would also participate in combat operations with at least three [[Fw'Sen-class picket ship]] in which the smaller ships would disable a target with their ion cannons allowing the ''Wurrif'' cruiser to use a tractor beam to capture the ship.<ref name="TaBSB" />

''Wurrif'' cruisers were 400 meters long and carried 200 [[Swarm-class battle droid|''Swarm''-class battle droids]]. They were armed with the Ssi-ruuvi equivalent of 6 heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], 24 [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and 12 [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors.<ref name="TaBSB" />

They were the smallest known Ssi-ruuvi warship crewed by Ssi-ruuvi officers. The ''Wurrif's'' crew complement consisted of 200 Ssi-ruuk, 1500 [[P'w'eck]] slaves and 156 [[Entechment|enteched]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. The vessel could carry up to 2,000 [[Metric ton/Legends|metric tons]] of cargo.<ref name="TaBSB" />

==History==
Four ''Wurrif''-class light cruisers were present at the [[Invasion of Bakura]].<ref name="EGVV" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
